extension.description: Orion v3.1.0 - Complete media addon with multiple torrent scrapers (Torrentio, MediaFusion, Jackettio, Orionoid), Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, Trakt integration with scrobbling, watchlists and liked lists, ResolveURL support, watch history, favorites, Kids Zone, and auto-play next episode.
extension.news: [3.1.0] Added Trakt scrobbling (auto-mark watched), Trakt watchlists, liked lists, custom lists, collection, recommendations. Added Kids Zone with animation, family movies, G/PG rated content with infinite scrolling.
